title: Owleaf Playback | Mod
description: Owleaf PlayBack is a client-side mod that displays videos, GIFs, and images on screen. It requires a server plugin to work; without it, the mod won’t function. It enhances Minecraft by allowing multimedia playback for a better experience.
body:
Owleaf PlayBack is a client-side mod that allows video, GIF, and image playback on-screen in Minecraft. It requires a server plugin to work; without it, the mod won’t function.

Features:
✔ Plays videos, GIFs, and images on the player’s screen.
✔ Requires a plugin on the server to work.
✔ Compatible with Bukkit/Spigot/Paper servers.
✔ Enhances immersion with dynamic visual content.
✔ Files are stored locally in the following path:
📂 .minecraft/config/owleaf_playback/

⚠ Important: The mod alone does not work; make sure to install the server plugin.

Plugin: https://modrinth.com/plugin/owleaf-playback-plugin
